intro: Paepalanthus chrysanthus, also known as the "Golden Spiderwort," is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Eriocaulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
